title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Senior Frontend Engineer to lead our frontend development team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in building scalable and maintainable frontend applications.

Responsibilities:
- Design and develop high-quality frontend applications using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and prioritize project requirements
- Troubleshoot and debug complex issues using Chart.js and other debugging tools
- Mentor junior engineers and provide code reviews
- Participate in code refactoring and optimization
- Stay up-to-date with the latest frontend development trends and best practices

Must-have skills:
- JavaScript
- HTML
- CSS
- Chart.js
- Debugging
- React
- Redux
- Webpack

Nice to have:
- TypeScript
- GraphQL
- Jest
